summary: Testing 5 fixes for Gradačac Mapa: (1) 404 page ✅, (2) Kontakt forma ✅, (3) Backend /api/contact ✅, (4) Datum format ✅, (5) JSON-LD BreadcrumbList ✅. CRITICAL BUG: Admin panel Sidebar does NOT have 'Kontakt Poruke' link — the route and page exist and work, but admin cannot navigate to it from the sidebar. 10/10 backend tests pass.

ui_bugs.issue: MISSING: 'Kontakt Poruke' navigation link in sidebar navItems array. The route /contact-messages exists in App.tsx and the ContactMessages.tsx page loads correctly when accessed directly, but there is no sidebar link for admin to discover/access it. Admin must manually type the URL.

action_items: CRITICAL FIX: Add 'Kontakt Poruke' entry to navItems array in /app/web-admin/src/components/Sidebar.tsx. Add: { to: '/contact-messages', label: 'Kontakt Poruke', icon: Mail, end: false }. The Mail icon is already imported in the file. This is the only outstanding bug from the 5 fixes being tested.
After adding sidebar link, rebuild admin panel: cd /app/web-admin && yarn build (or trigger redeploy so it serves the updated dist)
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.tsx: navItems array is missing { to: '/contact-messages', label: 'Kontakt Poruke', icon: Mail, end: false }. The route is properly defined in App.tsx and the ContactMessages.tsx component fully works (loads from /api/admin/contact-messages, supports mark-read and delete). Only the sidebar navigation link is absent.

success_rate.frontend: 83% — 404 page (PASS), Contact form + success message (PASS), Date format 23. aprila 2026. (PASS), JSON-LD BreadcrumbList on news detail (PASS), Admin contact messages page (PASS), Admin sidebar link (FAIL - missing)

seed_data_creation: Contact messages created during testing: 'TEST Tester Playwright' from playwright@test.com was submitted via form. These may still be in the database under /api/admin/contact-messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 fixes tested. 4 pass completely. 1 bug remains: Sidebar.tsx missing 'Kontakt Poruke' link. The fix is: add { to: '/contact-messages', label: 'Kontakt Poruke', icon: Mail, end: false } to navItems array in Sidebar.tsx. Mail icon already imported. After fix, admin panel must be rebuilt (yarn build in /app/web-admin).

rca_of_issue.bug: Admin sidebar missing 'Kontakt Poruke' navigation link
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Login to /api/admin-panel/ as admin@gradacac.ba. 2. Inspect the sidebar nav items. 3. 'Kontakt Poruke' is not listed. Admin has no way to navigate to contact-messages from the UI.
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The ContactMessages.tsx page component was created and the route /contact-messages was added to App.tsx, but Sidebar.tsx navItems array was not updated to include the navigation link.
rca_of_issue.fix: In /app/web-admin/src/components/Sidebar.tsx, add to navItems array: { to: '/contact-messages', label: 'Kontakt Poruke', icon: Mail, end: false }. The Mail icon is already imported at line 6. Then rebuild the admin panel.
